name: pec1
description: Portal web de gastronomia para PEC1

scripts.dev: parcel src/index.html src/categorias/recetas.html src/links/links.html src/det1/gazpacho-clasico.html src/det2/arroz-con-pollo-teriyaki.html --open
scripts.build: parcel build src/index.html src/categorias/recetas.html src/links/links.html src/det1/gazpacho-clasico.html src/det2/arroz-con-pollo-teriyaki.html
scripts.clean: powershell -Command "if (Test-Path dist) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force dist }; if (Test-Path .parcel-cache) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force .parcel-cache }"
